name: Diet Quality
definition: Overall dietary pattern and nutritional quality. Includes intake of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, refined carbohydrates, saturated fat, sugar, and ultra-processed foods. Proxy for nutritional exposures affecting metabolic and cardiovascular health.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Macronutrient composition affects insulin sensitivity, lipids, obesity
Diet influences blood pressure, endothelial function, atherosclerosis

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Dietary habits established; growth and metabolism
